series_metadata.series_description: This series contains records generally associated with self-registration by campers, collecting camping fees, assignment of sites, and other related documents

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor, unless they are scanned and saved in electronic format. After these documents are scanned and saved in an electronic format, the paper copy may be destroyed. ; Electronic: Retain 2 years after the State-wide financial statement audit and Agency/Departmental-wide audit are conducted by the State Auditor, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
